hero.title: The range.
hero.lede: Four sustainable acoustic materials for modern architecture. Each chosen for performance, surface, and a low footprint — and each with its own page.

items.name: Aisti® Aalto
items.body: Foam-formed natural wood fibre. Absorption Class A, two formats, two thicknesses. Fits standard T-grid ceilings or mounts directly with adhesive. Official distributor in Denmark.

items.name: Wuud
items.body: Embossed wooden cladding for interior and exterior — real birch, alder, aspen and pine, modified to hold deep relief. Finnish-developed; finishes and patterns on request.

items.name: Sappa
items.body: A new addition to the Beyond Rational range. Full presentation and specifications coming soon.

items.name: Mogu
items.body: A new addition to the Beyond Rational range. Full presentation and specifications coming soon.

gallery_head.body: Images are managed in the CMS — add or replace them at /admin.

cta.lede: Send the brief and we'll help you choose the right material, format, and mounting for your room.
